stem: Which composable enforces that only one item can be selected at a time?
feedback: createSingle extends createSelection to cap selection at a single item — that's the enforcement. createSelection allows multiple; createGroup adds batch/tri-state; createModel is the value store beneath them.

stem: Which composable is the multi-select foundation that the others extend?
feedback: createSelection is the multi-select base. createSingle, createGroup, and createNested all build on it; createModel is the lower-level value store beneath it.

stem: You need select-all with an indeterminate (tri-state) parent checkbox. Which composable?
feedback: createGroup extends createSelection with batch operations and tri-state support — exactly the select-all/indeterminate pattern.

stem: Which composable manages hierarchical, parent/child (tree) selection?
feedback: createNested extends createGroup for tree structures — treeviews, nested menus, and cascading parent/child selection.

stem: Which of these are built on the selection system? (Select all that apply)
feedback: createSingle, createGroup, and createNested all extend the selection stack. useBreakpoints is a responsive plugin — unrelated to selection.
